title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Vascon Engineers

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Vascon Engineers
jsonLd.description:
Vascon Engineers, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!
